rater: claude-fable-5 (session director; scored independently BEFORE reading any other rater's output)
note: Rater B of the G1 double-blind pass. The roadmap called for a human rater; the user could not judge faithfulness cold and asked for assistance, so the process was amended (recorded honestly): rater B is a second independent model (different family from the gpt-5.5 generator), and the human's role moved to final adjudication of inter-rater disagreements with both reasonings shown. Faithful = the assertion is licensed by the brief's own words under the published band conventions (about/~/bare N → ±10%; 'at least N' → min only; qualitative words → no band); omissions never count against a written assertion.

omissions: 'organised around a central hall so no room is reached through another' licenses hall-adjacency for every room and reachability — not asserted

small-office.note: A5 band ±10% follows the published '~N → ±10%' convention (the eval's own oracle uses ±15% here; convention-faithful, flagged for adjudication)

reasons.A7: kitchen↔living direct edge over-asserts: 'the kitchen, dining, and living zones flow into one another' is satisfied by a kitchen–dining–living chain; only the dining-centred edges are safely licensed

reasons.A1: rooms == 2 is an undercount the brief does not license: 'generous rooms' (plural) off the hall plus an implied bathroom/living in any one-bedroom flat make an exact count of 2 unsupportable
rooms == 4 undercounts: 'a run of rooms across the top' in a two-bedroom FLAT implies at least a living/kitchen space beyond the two bedrooms, hall, and bathroom; exact 4 is not licensed
